details.mistral_response_summary: Mistral responded with detailed Korean privacy advice about resident registration numbers, warning about data leakage risks, advising to contact official agencies (행정안전부, 국민연금공단, 세무서 등) for procedures.

analysis.observation: Same as #267: hold=0 passthrough. Mistral responds normally, APF warning not injected. B16 build adds RAW_FRAME diagnostic logging — dev should check Etap syslog around 14:20 KST for RAW_FRAME hex dump of /api/trpc/message.newChat body to understand the actual request format.
analysis.verdict: WARNING_NOT_VISIBLE (passthrough). Dev: check RAW_FRAME logs now.
